title: leucanthemum flosculosum
intro: Leucanthemum flosculosum, also known as the small daisy or little white daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Leucanthemum flosculosum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as dried and used in capsules or tinctures, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
